what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter ledger record for a channel attachment: it documents an image attachment in the design-assets channel, pointing to the image resource image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Gold_Finishes and recording when it was added.
observations: The entire content is YAML frontmatter with no body text
The target is an image:// URI: design-assets/icons/Icon_Gold_Finishes
standouts: Points to a specific icon image named Icon_Gold_Finishes
Typed explicitly as an images attachment
Functions as a timestamped channel-memory attachment record
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed metadata schema: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
Target uses an image:// URI scheme
concerns: The image:// target cannot be resolved or verified from this file alone
No uploader, author, or provenance metadata
No alt text, caption, or description of the image
No link to the message or context it was attached to
No file format, size, or dimension information
notes: A bare metadata stub that records an image attachment to design-assets but carries almost no descriptive or provenance detail.
questions: Which message or post is this attachment attached to?
Is the referenced image still available and where is it physically stored?
What file format, dimensions, or size does Icon_Gold_Finishes have?
What does the Icon_Gold_Finishes image depict?
purpose_vs_actual: The file's purpose is to record an attachment metadata entry, and that is exactly what it does; there is no additional stated purpose to compare against.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a persistent, queryable record of an image attachment shared in the design-assets channel so the resource can be located and associated with channel activity later.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed pointer to a design-assets icon image, which a fused system could use to correlate attachments with channel content and asset locations.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel-memory attachment record for an image named Icon_Gold_Finishes in the design-assets channel, added on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: To log an image attachment shared in the design-assets channel so it can be referenced and retrieved later.
